level1_segments.summary: The robotic system undergoes a comprehensive preoperative calibration sequence including arm status, homing, accuracy, brake, and angle discrepancy checks.
The surgical team performs surgery planning, initial registration checks, bone registration, and final intraoperative planning adjustments.
The surgeon executes a series of bone preparation steps on various surfaces (distal, anterior, posterior) interspersed with frequent real-time image guidance checks.
The system cycles through bone preparation and RIO checks for both anterior and posterior views before settling on posterior bone preparation.
The robot monitor displays the intra-operative planning phase for an extended duration.
The system indicates the completion of the current surgical task.
The robot monitor initiates a new phase or procedure start sequence.

level2_segments.summary: The robotic system undergoes a comprehensive preoperative calibration sequence including arm status, homing, accuracy, brake, and angle discrepancy checks.
The surgical team performs surgery planning, initial registration checks, bone registration, and final intraoperative planning adjustments.
The surgeon executes a series of bone preparation steps on various surfaces interspersed with frequent real-time image guidance and RIO checks.
The system displays an extended intra-operative planning phase, indicates task completion, and initiates a new procedure start sequence.
